content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

June 2, 2006

Ernest B. Arnold, President
PAMRC
1502 Fremont Avenue
South Pasadena, CA 91030


RE: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-06-086

Dear Mr. Arnold:

This correspondence is written confirmation that the Fair Political Practices Commission has withdrawn your May 5, 2006, request for advice under the provisions of the Political Reform Act,¹ as you requested during our phone conversation on June 1, 2006. Consequently, no response will be prepared. Your request is withdrawn.

If I may be of any further assistance, please do not hesitate to contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel


LM:rd
I:\AdviceLtrs\06-086


¹ Government Code sections 81000- 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
